data.title: How to Use Lemlist for Multichannel Outreach (Step-by-Step)
data.excerpt: Learn how to set up your first Lemlist campaign from scratch. This step-by-step tutorial covers cold email, LinkedIn outreach, and deliverability — try it free.

$media.alt: How to Use Lemlist for Multichannel Outreach (Step-by-Step)

children.text: How to Use Lemlist: A Step-by-Step Tutorial for Multichannel Outreach That Actually Works

I've tested a lot of outreach tools. Most of them do one thing well — send emails — and then leave you stitching together three other apps for LinkedIn, phone calls, and deliverability. Lemlist is different. It bundles email, LinkedIn, SMS, calls, and a built-in lead database into a single platform, and it does all of this without feeling bloated.

In this tutorial, I'm going to walk you through setting up your first Lemlist campaign from absolute zero. Whether you're a solo founder trying to book demos or an agency managing outreach for ten clients, the steps below will get you live in under an hour.
If you're already curious and want to follow along, you can
grab a 30-day free trial here
What Is Lemlist?

Lemlist is a multichannel outreach platform built for B2B teams who want to contact prospects across email, LinkedIn, phone, SMS, and WhatsApp — all from one dashboard. What makes it stand out is its obsession with personalization and deliverability.

The platform includes a massive database of 650M+ contacts, AI-powered sequence writing, dynamic image personalization (think screenshots of a prospect's website embedded in your email), and a deliverability hub with automatic warm-up so your emails land in inboxes instead of spam folders.
I wrote a deeper breakdown of the platform if you want the full picture:
What Is Lemlist and Why Teams Are Switching to It
Why I Recommend Lemlist Over Other Outreach Tools
I'm not going to pretend there aren't other options out there. There are plenty. But here's why Lemlist consistently wins for me:
1. True multichannel from one place.
You're not just sending emails. You can automate LinkedIn profile visits, connection requests, messages, and even voice drops — and it all lives in the same campaign builder. No Zapier hacks needed.
2. Personalization that goes beyond `{first_name}`.

Lemlist lets you create dynamic images, custom landing pages for each lead, and AI-generated copy that adapts to each prospect's company, role, and pain points. When I switched from generic templates to Lemlist's personalization, my reply rates nearly doubled.
3. Built-in deliverability tools.

Most platforms leave you to figure out email warm-up on your own. Lemlist has a dedicated deliverability hub that monitors your sender reputation, rotates sending accounts, and gradually warms up new domains. This alone saved me from buying a separate tool.
4. A 650M+ lead database with built-in finder.
Instead of paying for Apollo, Lusha, or another enrichment tool separately, Lemlist includes email and phone number finding right inside the platform.
If you want a deeper comparison of why teams are making the switch, check out
Why Choose Lemlist for Your Outreach Stack
Step-by-Step: Setting Up Your First Lemlist Campaign
Here's the part you came for. Let's build a real campaign together.
Step 1: Create Your Account and Pick a Plan
Head to
lemlist.com
and sign up. You'll get a 14-day free trial on any plan, but if you use the link in this post, you can unlock an extended 30-day trial — plenty of time to test everything properly.
When choosing a plan, here's the quick breakdown:
Email plan (from €39/mo):
Great if you only need email outreach. Includes unlimited users, 5,000 emails/month, the lead database, and the deliverability hub.
Multichannel plan (from €109/mo):
This is the one I recommend. It adds LinkedIn automation, SMS, WhatsApp (as an add-on), a built-in call dialer with VoIP, and 5 senders per user. Unlimited emails and messages.
For most B2B teams doing serious outbound, the Multichannel plan is where the real value lives.
Step 2: Build Your Lead List
Inside Lemlist, click on
"Leads"
in the sidebar. You have two options:
Option A: Use Lemlist's built-in database.

Search by job title, company size, industry, location, and technology stack. The database has over 650 million contacts. Filter ruthlessly — a tight list of 200 well-matched leads will outperform a spray of 10,000 random ones every time.
Option B: Import your own list.
Upload a CSV with columns for first name, last name, company, email, LinkedIn URL, and any custom fields you want to use for personalization (like a recent blog post they wrote, or their tech stack).
Pro tip: I always add at least 3-5 custom merge fields per lead. The more data you feed Lemlist's AI, the more convincing your personalized messages will be.
Step 3: Create Your Sequence
Navigate to
"Campaigns"
and click
"Create a campaign."
You'll land in the sequence builder, which is a drag-and-drop timeline of touchpoints.
Here's a multichannel sequence that's been working well for me:
Day 1 — Email #1:
Short, personalized intro email. Reference something specific about their company. Use a dynamic screenshot of their homepage as an image if you want to really stand out.
Day 3 — LinkedIn Visit:
Automatically visit their LinkedIn profile. This creates a subtle awareness trigger.
Day 4 — LinkedIn Connection Request:
Send a connection request with a short note.
Day 6 — Email #2:
Follow up with a case study or social proof relevant to their industry.
Day 9 — LinkedIn Message:
If they accepted your connection, send a friendly message referencing your email.
Day 12 — Email #3:
The breakup email. Short, no pressure, with a clear question.
Lemlist's AI — called
lemCopilot

— can draft each of these steps for you. Just describe your offer, your ideal customer, and your tone, and it generates ready-to-send copy. I still tweak the output, but it cuts my sequence creation time from an hour to fifteen minutes.
Step 4: Add Personalization Layers
This is where Lemlist separates itself from every other tool I've used.
Dynamic images:
Upload an image template, and Lemlist will overlay the lead's name, company logo, or website screenshot automatically. Every recipient sees a version that looks like it was made just for them.
Custom landing pages:
You can generate a unique landing page per lead. Imagine sending a prospect an email that links to a page with *their* logo, *their* pain points, and a personalized calendar booking link.
AI variables:

Beyond standard merge tags, you can use AI to generate custom sentences for each lead based on data in your CSV. For example, "I noticed {{company}} recently {{ai_generated_insight}} — here's how we can help." This feels genuinely personal without any manual work.
Step 5: Configure Deliverability
Before you hit send, go to the
Deliverability Hub
in the left sidebar. Here's what to set up:
Connect your sending email(s).
Lemlist supports Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, and custom SMTP. The Multichannel plan lets you rotate up to 5 senders per user.
Enable warm-up.

Toggle on lemwarm (Lemlist's built-in warm-up tool). It gradually increases your sending volume while exchanging emails with other lemwarm users to build your sender reputation. Run this for at least 2-3 weeks before starting outreach on a new domain.
Check your DNS records.
Lemlist walks you through SPF, DKIM, and DMARC setup. Don't skip this — it's the single biggest factor in whether your emails land in the inbox.
Step 6: Launch and Monitor
Hit
"Launch"
and watch your campaign go live. Lemlist's dashboard gives you real-time stats on:
Open rates (with automatic open tracking)
Reply rates (categorized as positive, negative, or neutral)
LinkedIn acceptance rates
Call outcomes
Pay special attention to your
reply rate
in the first 48 hours. If it's below 3-5%, your subject line or first line probably needs work. Lemlist's A/B testing feature lets you test up to 5 variants of any email step, so iterate fast.
I wrote a full guide on campaign optimization:
Lemlist Tips & Best Practices
New & Standout Features Worth Exploring
Lemlist ships updates frequently, and a few recent additions have genuinely impressed me:
lemAgent (AI Agents):
You can now deploy AI agents that handle parts of your outreach autonomously — from lead research to follow-up writing. Think of it as an AI SDR that works inside your Lemlist account.
Unified Inbox:

All your email replies, LinkedIn messages, and SMS responses funnel into a single inbox. No more tab-switching between platforms. You can reply, assign to teammates, and tag conversations without leaving Lemlist.
WhatsApp Automation:

Recently added as an add-on, this lets you include WhatsApp messages in your sequences. For teams targeting markets where WhatsApp dominates (LATAM, parts of Europe, Middle East), this is a game-changer.
Built-in Call Dialer with VoIP:
The Multichannel plan now includes a native dialer. You can make calls directly from Lemlist, log outcomes, and add call steps to your sequences. No need for a separate phone tool.
For a full breakdown of what's new, see
Lemlist New Features & Updates
Who Lemlist Is Ideal For
Lemlist isn't for everyone, and that's fine. Here's who will get the most out of it:
B2B sales teams
running account-based or outbound-led strategies. If your pipeline depends on cold outreach at scale, Lemlist gives you everything in one place.
Agencies
managing outreach for multiple clients. The platform supports unlimited users and lets you segment campaigns by client, domain, and audience.
Solo founders and bootstrapped startups
who can't afford (or don't want) a stack of five different tools. Lemlist replaces your email tool, LinkedIn automation tool, lead database, warm-up service, and calling software.
Recruiters
doing outbound sourcing. The multichannel approach works beautifully for reaching passive candidates — especially with LinkedIn + email combos.
Teams that care about deliverability.
If you've been burned by low open rates or spam folder placement, Lemlist's deliverability hub is one of the best I've seen in any outreach platform.
For more examples of how different teams use Lemlist, check out
Lemlist Use Cases & Real Results
Tips to Maximize Your Results with Lemlist
After months of using Lemlist, here are the habits that made the biggest difference for me:
1. Never skip warm-up.
I know it's tempting to launch immediately. Don't. Run lemwarm for at least 14 days on a new domain. Your open rates will thank you.
2. Keep your first email under 80 words.
Long cold emails get deleted. Open with a relevant observation about their company, state your value prop in one sentence, and close with a simple question.
3. Use the A/B testing on every campaign.
Test subject lines first (they control open rates), then test first lines (they control reply rates). Let Lemlist's AI generate variants for you.
4. Layer channels thoughtfully.

Don't blast every channel on day one. Space out your touchpoints and vary the medium. An email followed by a LinkedIn visit two days later feels natural; a simultaneous email + LinkedIn message + SMS feels desperate.
5. Clean your lists regularly.
Use Lemlist's built-in email verification before sending. Bounce rates above 3% will hurt your sender reputation fast.
6. Review your Unified Inbox daily.
Replies have a shelf life. The faster you respond to positive replies, the higher your meeting booking rate.
Ready to put all of this into practice?
Start your Lemlist free trial and launch your first campaign this week

children.text: Is Lemlist good for cold email beginners?

Absolutely. Lemlist's AI-powered sequence builder and lemCopilot make it easy to write professional outreach even if you've never sent a cold email before. The platform also includes pre-built templates and a deliverability hub that handles the technical setup for you.
How much does Lemlist cost?

The Email plan starts at €39/month and covers email-only outreach with 5,000 emails/month, unlimited users, and access to the 650M+ lead database. The Multichannel plan starts at €109/month and adds LinkedIn automation, SMS, WhatsApp, a built-in call dialer, and 5 senders per user with unlimited emails and messages.
Can Lemlist replace my LinkedIn automation tool?

Yes. On the Multichannel plan, Lemlist automates LinkedIn profile visits, connection requests, messages, and InMails — all integrated into the same campaign timeline as your emails and calls. You don't need a separate tool like Dripify or Expandi.
How long should I warm up my email domain before launching a Lemlist campaign?

Lemlist recommends at least 14 days of warm-up using their built-in lemwarm feature. For brand-new domains, 21-28 days is safer. The deliverability hub monitors your sender reputation and automatically adjusts sending volume.
